name: flow
description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code. Ships /flow:ship plus the skeptical-reviewer surface (auditor + plan-critic) with /flow:audit-plan, /flow:audit-completion, /flow:critique-plan, /flow:log-disagreement. Canonical 11-step loop documented at plugins/flow/docs/workflow.md; project-specific values come from flow.config.json (schema in PR 2).
